name: Savory Lamb Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 Lamb leg center steaks, cut into 1-inch strips
1 medium Red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine lemon juice, 1 tablespoon oil, cornstarch, 1 clove garlic, oregano, and salt.
2. Trim excess fat from lamb steaks; remove bone.
3. Cut lamb across the grain into 1-inch thick slices.
4. Place lamb in a plastic bag; add marinade, turning to coat. Seal bag securely and marinate in refrigerator for 30 minutes.
5. Heat remaining 1 tablespoon oil in a wok or large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add 1 clove garlic; stir-fry for 10 seconds.
7. Add bell pepper and mushrooms; stir-fry for 2-3 minutes. Remove vegetables and keep warm.
8. Stir-fry lamb (1/2 at a time) for 2-3 minutes until cooked through.
9. Return lamb and vegetables to the pan; heat through.
10. Serve and enjoy. Makes 4 servings.
Prep Time: 20 minutes
Marinate: 30 minutes
Cook time: 15 minutes
